wrapper_notes: mainstream chat prescreen candidate; prefer official tokenizer chat_template, but runtime still needs trust_remote_code and may fall back to a non-standard generate path

tokenizer_load_policy.notes: ChatGLM3 official loading path requires trust_remote_code=True; keep use_fast=False in the provisional prescreen path to stay close to the official AutoTokenizer/AutoModel examples.
config_patch_notes: set tokenizer.batch_encode_plus = tokenizer.__call__ for ChatGLMTokenizer compatibility
set config.max_length = config.seq_length for ChatGLM3 compatibility
wrap ChatGLMForConditionalGeneration with GenerationMixin for Transformers compatibility
